"'''Problem Solvers'''" was a [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] appearing in [[Star Wars Tales 20|''Star Wars Tales'' 20]]. It was reprinted in ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 6]]'' and ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The New Republic Vol. 1]]''.

==Plot summary==
Months after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], on an unidentified [[Ecumenopolis/Legends|ecumenopolis]] within the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], [[Leia Skywalker Organa Solo|Leia Organa]] reminds [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] of the importance of a new information-technology crew to the fledgling state as many important computers are nonfunctional, and of his responsibility for finding one. He informs her that he instead decided to go to a card game on [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] that he 'couldn't miss', and that he reassigned the task to [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]].

A group of rowdy [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]], regarded by Organa as the most primitive sentients in the New Republic, barges into the computer room in which the two Rebel heroes stand, and Organa panics as the new 'technicians' destroy the computers with their weapons and anti-[[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]] countermeasures, knocking over C-3PO in the process. A furious Organa tells Solo to evict them from the room, and decides that their first priority should instead be finding a Human Resources director to hire technicians, and asks Solo as to who their droid found to fill that role. He meekly explains that earlier, Organa stated that their new personnel needed to be 'strong and uncompromising - someone everyone would respect'. As the new HR director - a [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]], a beast indeed strong and respect-demanding, but ferocious and not even fully sentient - walks into the room behind her, Organa declares her unease.
